Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota diary diya, ab wo usmein sirf meri taang ki lambai likhti hai.

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota taala diya, 
Ab wo har saman ko taalne ki koshish karti hai, par khud ki zubaan ko nahi taal sakti!

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "time machine" diya, 
ab wo har roz mujhe apne shaadi ki salgirah par bulati hai.

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota camera diya, ab wo apne jeevan ke har pal ko capture karne mein lgi hai, aur main samajhta hoon ki wo apne jeevan ki sabse badi galti ko bhi capture kar legi - uski shaadi ki photo!

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "breakup kit" diya. 
Ab wo haar maan gayi hai!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "jhaadu" diya, ab wo hai "sweeping" romance!

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota khet diya, 
Ab wo khushi se baalti hai, kyunki usme sab kuchh ugta hai, siwaaye hamari salary ke.

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota alarm clock diya, 
ab wo roz subah kehti hai, "Jaag gaya hai, ab so ja."

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota map diya,

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "jawan" dog diya, ab dog bhi bolta hai "main toh bahut boodha ho gaya hoon, mujhe chhod do".

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota pillow diya, 
Ab wo kehti hai, ab mujhe neend aa rahi hai kyunki mere paas ab support hai!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota remote control diya, ab wo meri zindagi ko bhi control karti hai.
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "bhoolne ki bimari" diya, ab woh uska naam bhi bhool gayi!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota pashu palna chaaha, usne ek billi paali, par ab vo billi hi uska baap ban gayi hai.
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "shaadi ke baad" diary diya, usme likha tha: "Pehli shaadi ki yaadein, aur doosri shaadi ki tayariyan".
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "password" diya, ab wo har din usse bhool jaati hai.

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota parde ka button diya.
Ab voh der tak so sakti hai, kyunki ab uska jalne ka problem solve ho gaya hai!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "suniya" diya, ab woh bolti hai "tere bina mujhe kuchh bhi sunai nahin deta!"
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "bhoolne ki bimari" ka ilaaj diya, ab woh use bhi bhool gayi!

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "dil" diya, 
ab vo kisi aur ko de gayi!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "chupkar baithne ka course" diya. Ab wo sirf sochti hai, baat nahi karti.

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "khoya hua" dikhaane wala device diya. 
Ab wo har jagah mujhe dhundh leti hai.
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "khilona" diya, ab vo khilona uske saath khelta hai aur dost akela reh gaya!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "suniya" diya, lekin wo toh pehle se hi suni thi!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "sachchai meter" diya, ab wo har jhooth ka sach mein pata kar leti hai!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "moun" diya, ab ghar mein sab kuch sunai deta hai!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "guru" diya, ab wo har baat pe kehti hai, "Maine seekh liya hai!"
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota radio diya, ab wo sirf usi ki baat sunti hai!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "chashma" diya, ab wo mere dost ko dekh bhi nahi pa rahi.
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "jawan" dog diya, ab vo kehti hai ki ghar pe ek naya jawan aaya hai, lekin mere dost ka bachcha 20 saal ka ho gaya hai.

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "khazaana" diya, 
ab vo use har din kholti hai par paisa nahi nikalta,

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "chumbak" diya, ab vo meri tarap se chumbke ki tarap ho gayi.
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "aakash" diya, ab wo usmein khoyi rehti hai.
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "suraksha" diya, ab wo kisi bhi baat ko lekar na chinta karti hai, kyunki uska "suraksha" hai - Apni memory card!

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota mirror diya,

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota magnet diya, ab wo har cheez ko attract karti hai, chahe woh mere dost ke paas ka paisa ho ya mere paas ka dil!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "sankalp" diya, ab wo sirf ek baar bolti hai.
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "memory card" diya, ab wo har baat yaad rakh leti hai, aur mujhe yaad dilati hai!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "bharosa" diya, ab wo har din use check karti hai.

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "signal" diya.

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "darwaza" diya, ab wo ghar se bahar nikalne ke liye bhi permission leti hai!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "chumban" diya, lekin uski biwi ne kaha, "Yeh toh pura din hum dono ko chumban chahiye!"

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "aaina" diya, ab wo har din apne aap ko dekhkar khush ho rahi hai, kyunki usmein wo ajnabi nahi lagti!

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "talaq" diya, ab dono khush hain kyunki unke problems kam ho gaye hain, bas ek hi problem hai - ab dono ko samjhane wala koi nahi hai!
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "sapna" diya, ab vo har raat sapne mein hi uska saath nahin chodti.
Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "chabutra" diya, ab who bhi udne ki koshish karti hai to uska aisa haal ho jaata hai!

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "bhaasha" diya, ab woh sirf ek shabd mein baat karti hai - "Haan" ya "Nahin".

ab wo har din badal deti hai, aur main bhool jaata hoon!

ab wo usey bhool nahi pa rahi.

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "chabi" diya, ab ghar ke darwaaze bina uske nahi khulte, aur apni biwi ke dil ke bhi.

Mere dost ne apni biwi ko ek naya ekdum hi chhota "raaz" diya, ab use raaz mein rehna bhool gayi.
